hero.title: Build the Future of
hero.paragraph: At Trivoxa, we're not just a company; we're a community of innovators, educators, and creators dedicated to bridging the global tech talent gap. Join us and make an impact.

why.heading: Why You'll Love Trivoxa
why.subheading: We believe that great work happens when talented people are supported, empowered, and inspired.

items.title: Remote-First Culture
items.desc: Work from anywhere in the world. We value outcomes over hours and trust our team to manage their own schedules.

items.title: Continuous Growth
items.desc: Access all our premium courses for free, plus a $2,000 annual learning stipend for external workshops.

items.title: Health & Wellness
items.desc: Comprehensive medical, dental, and mental wellness programs and reimbursements.

items.title: Collaborative Spirit
items.desc: Join a team of world-class experts who are passionate about sharing knowledge and helping each other grow.

items.title: Modern Tech Stack
items.desc: We use the latest tools and technologies. No legacy code holding you back—only forward-thinking solutions.

items.title: Stability & Equity
items.desc: Competitive base salaries, performance bonuses, and stock options for all full-time team members.

jobs.heading: Current Opportunities
jobs.noFitDesc: We're always looking for exceptional talent.

seo.h1: Build the Future of Tech Education

altTags.heroImg: Trivoxa team working together in a collaborative environment

seo.title: Careers at Trivoxa Technologies | Join Our Team
seo.description: Explore open roles at Trivoxa. We're hiring engineers, designers, instructors and marketers. Remote-first culture with competitive benefits.
seo.keywords: Trivoxa careers, tech jobs, remote developer jobs, IT instructor jobs, hiring
seo.ogDescription: Build the future of tech education. Join our remote-first team of innovators and educators.

newsletter.heading: Stay Connected with Our Talent Network
newsletter.paragraph: Not ready to apply just yet? Join our network to get updates on new roles, culture stories, and company news.
newsletter.privacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.
